data.title: Interna Therapeutics Announces Research Collaboration with Daiichi Sankyo to Advance MNM-Based Targeted Delivery Technologies
data.description: Interna Therapeutics, an Israeli biotech firm based in Petach Tikva, revealed on April 16, 2026, its partnership with Daiichi Sankyo (TSE: 4568), a renowned Japanese pharmaceutical company. Interna Therapeutics specializes in developing its Molecular Nano Motor (MNM) intracellular delivery system and is currently in the clinical trial phase. This collaboration marks a significant advancement in both companies' research and development efforts, aiming to leverage their resources and expertise.

data.title: Plastic Jar Packaging Market Forecast & Outlook 2026-2036 Driven by PCR & Mono-Material Shift | Future Market Insights
data.description: A recent market report from Future Market Insights reveals that the global plastic jar packaging market is experiencing steady growth. This growth is fueled by a growing trend of transitioning from heavy glass containers to lighter, environmentally friendly polymer options. The analysis indicates that the market is set to continue this upward trajectory, with significant increases in demand for plastic jar packaging expected. The shift towards recyclable materials is a key driver in this trend, reflecting a movement towards more sustainable packaging solutions. The market is anticipated to see substantial growth in the coming years, making it a lucrative sector for businesses to explore.

data.title: BSV Association Expands Global BSV Access with Onramp Money Integration Across Asia, MENA and Latin America
data.description: The BSV Association revealed today in Zug, Switzerland on April 16, 2026, that Onramp Money, a prominent non-custodial fiat gateway platform, has successfully incorporated the BSV blockchain and its native asset, BSV. This move aims to broaden BSV's reach by enhancing its accessibility in various high-growth markets.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market cap falls by 20% to $2.4 trillion in Q1 2026. Report attributes $622B loss to Fed policy change and geopolitical issues. CEX volumes hit rock bottom since Nov 2023.
data.description: In the first quarter of the year, the crypto market experienced a significant downturn, losing a total of $622 billion due to the Federal Reserve's policy shift and ongoing geopolitical turmoil. During this period, centralized exchange (CEX) volumes dropped to their lowest point since November 2023. For more information, refer to the full report by CoinGecko.

data.title: South Korea to trial tokenized deposits for govt spending in Q4 2026. Aiming for 25% treasury digitalization by 2030 in Sejong City.
data.description: The finance ministry of South Korea plans to test blockchain-based tokenized deposits for government operational expenses in Sejong City as part of an initiative aiming for 25% treasury digitization by 2030.
ISRAELI STRIKE SEVERS LAST BRIDGE LINKING SOUTHERN LEBANON TO REST OF COUNTRY, SENIOR LEBANESE SECURITY OFFICIAL SAYS

data.title: K Wave Media Reports Strong Momentum Across Film and Drama IP Portfolio, Highlighting Breakout Box Office Success and Cannes Recognition
data.description: "Recently, the South Korean film "Whispering Water" dominated the box office, marking a significant achievement with impressive numbers in attendance. Additionally, the film "Dora" has been selected to feature at the prestigious Cannes Directors' Fortnight, gaining global recognition. Furthermore, the highly anticipated debut of "The Scarecrow" on television is expected to draw in a large audience for its broadcast premiere."
SINGAPORE APPROVES IMPORTS OF MEAT AND EGGS FROM GREECE, LITHUANIA, AND LATVIA.

data.title: ECARX Holdings Announces Lone Fønss Schrøder as Chairperson of the Board
data.description: Global mobility tech provider, ECARX Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: ECX), made a significant move in enhancing corporate governance and expanding globally with the appointment of Lone Fønss Schrøder as Chairperson. The announcement was made in London on April 16, 2026. This strategic decision aims to strengthen operations and drive the company's expansion plans.
DUBAI IS ACTING FAST TO PROVIDE HEDGE FUNDS WITH GREATER FLEXIBILITY AMID IRAN WAR-RELATED DISRUPTIONS, ACCORDING TO SOURCES.

data.title: XPENG Publishes 2025 Environmental, Social and Governance Report
data.description: XPeng Inc., a prominent global AI mobility technology company, revealed the publication of its 2025 Environmental, Social and Governance Report. This report provides insights into the company's sustainability efforts and practices. XPeng is listed on the NYSE as XPEV and on the HKEX as 9868.

data.title: Kering partners with ICCF for flagship brand ICICLE, acquires minority stake in the company.
data.description: In recent updates, it has been reported that the number of new COVID-19 cases has increased by over 2,000 in the past 24 hours. The total number of active cases now stands at approximately 15,000. Additionally, the number of recoveries has also seen a significant rise, with over 1,500 individuals having recovered from the virus. Sadly, the death toll has climbed to nearly 500. These numbers reflect the ongoing challenges posed by the pandemic, emphasizing the need for continued vigilance and adherence to safety measures.

data.description: Taipei, April 16, 2026 - With the 2026 Annual General Meeting (AGM) for BES Engineering Corporation (stock symbol: BES, code: 2515.TW) set for May 21, 2026, Delpha Construction Company (stock symbol: Delpha, code: 2530.TW) and PJ Group have officially ramped up their shareholder activism efforts.
